Name: THRUSTERS_PARAM_NPC_ST
Description: Defines where certain particles should appear under various circumstances. For NPCs.

Fields.Name: Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: SFX generation dummy poly position (-1: placement position) dummy poly ID. If specified as a booster, it will be the ID of the dummy poly in the booster.

Fields.Name: Main: Slot Number
Fields.Description: -1: Do not set loop SFX when there is no management or no management slot

Fields.Name: Main: RPC Type
Fields.Description: Used when you want to change the size of SFX etc. according to the horizontal movement speed of the character. If it is 1, the actual value used is 60000.

Fields.Name: Main: Is Horizontal
Fields.Description: 0: Maintain direction, 1: Align horizontally

Fields.Name: Main: Delete SFX on End of Action
Main: SFX are always visible
Fields.Description: SFX will always appear, even if the entity is invisible.

Fields.Name: Main: Correction Direction based on Movement
Fields.Description: Used to change the direction of the dummy poly according to the character's movement direction.

Fields.Name: Main: SFX Scale
Fields.Description: SFX scale value
